source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Curves X and Y in the figure denote open circuit and full-load zero power factor (zpf) characteristics of a synchronous generator. Q is a point on the zpf characteristics at 1.0 p.u. voltage. The vertical distance PQ in figure gives the voltage drop across

the task combines visual reading of the plotted characteristics with domain knowledge about synchronous generator characteristics

the prompt asks for one named quantity, making downstream exact or normalized matching feasible
